THEAPPRENTICE-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.title: Constant Struggle
THEAPPRENTICE-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.descript: Start combat with 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] and 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. Choose the first card in your initial hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.selectio: Select a card to add to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONSTANT_STRUGGLE.flavor: The cost of knowing exactly what you need.
THEAPPRENTICE-POETIC_STRUGGLE.title: Poetic Struggle
THEAPPRENTICE-POETIC_STRUGGLE.descriptio: Start combat with 2 [blue]Unweak[/blue] and 2 [blue]Unvulnerable[/blue]. Choose the first card in your initial hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-POETIC_STRUGGLE.selectionP: Select a card to add to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-POETIC_STRUGGLE.flavor: What once weighed you down now lifts you up.
THEAPPRENTICE-BLANK_SLATE.title: Blank Slate
THEAPPRENTICE-BLANK_SLATE.flavor: A prototype, stripped to its essentials.
